name: Network Toolkit
description: 82+ network utilities across 8 groups — IP calculators, DNS lookups (A/AAAA/MX/TXT/NS/SOA/SRV/DKIM/DMARC), DNS propagation checker, WHOIS/RDAP, domain age/expiry/availability, URL tools, HTTP header checker, SSL certificate viewer, CSR decoder/generator, PEM decoder, email tools, open redirect checker, and more. Shared-hosting friendly — no raw sockets or root access required.
author: Shamrouz Awan
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='10'/><line x1='2' y1='12' x2='22' y2='12'/><path d='M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z'/></svg>

meta.title: Network Toolkit — 70+ Free Online Network & DNS Utilities
meta.description: IP calculators, DNS lookups, WHOIS/RDAP, HTTP header checker, SSL certificate inspector, redirect chain tracer, SPF/DKIM/DMARC checker and 60+ more network tools — all free, shared-hosting friendly.
